assignments.name: Add_SHF_Forecast_Record_to_List
assignments.label: Add SHF Forecast Record to List

assignments.name: Assign_Phase_Baseline_to_Choice_List
assignments.label: Assign Phase Baseline to Choice List

assignments.name: Assign_Read_Only_Forecast_to_List
assignments.label: Assign Read Only Forecast to List

assignments.name: Assign_Update_Lookup_to_SHF_Forecasts
assignments.label: Assign Update Lookup to SHF Forecasts

choices.name: chcSkipActualsandForecast
choices.choiceText: Skip editing further Actuals and Forecasts

decisions.name: Check_if_Baseline_has_already_been_chosen
decisions.label: Check if Baseline has already been chosen

decisions.name: Check_if_Forecast_Needs_Attaching_to_Update
decisions.label: Check if Forecast Needs Attaching to Update

decisions.name: Check_if_More_Phases_to_be_Added
decisions.label: Check if More Phases to be Added

decisions.name: Check_if_record_Id_is_present
decisions.label: Check if record Id is present

decisions.description: Checks whether an actual to edit has been found.
decisions.name: Is_Actual_to_Edit_Found
decisions.label: Is Actual to Edit Found?

Flow.description: Screen Flow to capture details of Monthly Report from Grant Recipient along with associated Actual and Forecast records - Skip if no Phases - SP do 3 months of forecasts

formulas.name: flaMonthPriorStartDate
formulas.expression: DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) = 1, YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, YEAR(TODAY())), IF(MONTH(TODAY()) = 1, 12, MONTH(TODAY()) - 1), 1 )

Flow.interviewLabel: DESNZ - Monthly Update Form inc Actuals and Forecasts {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: DESNZ - Monthly Update Form inc Actuals and Forecasts

fields.name: Actuals_Header
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Update: Actuals for {!varReportingPeriodMonth}

{!rcdFundingAward.Name}

{!rcdParentBaseline.Baseline_Version__c}

Update Due: {!Get_correct_Deadline_date.Tenth_Working_Day__c}

All fields must be completed to save the form. If you have incomplete figures at the time of creating the first draft then enter 0 for that data and return to finish your update later. Updates cannot be edited after the due date


Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

fields.name: Grant_Capital_Spend_ACT
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of capital spend this month (grant only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Grant_Admin_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Admin spend this month (grant only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Grant_Ancillary_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Ancillary spend this month (grant only).

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Grant_A_A_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Admin and Ancillary spend this month (grant only).

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Co_funding_Capital_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of capital spend this month (co-funding only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.
Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Total_Grant_funding_toward_on_gas_LCH
fields.fieldText: Total Grant funding toward on-gas LCH
fields.helpText: Please include these costs in the Grant capital spend field

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Total_Co_funding_toward_on_gas_LCH_offer
fields.fieldText: Total Co-funding toward on-gas LCH offer
fields.helpText: Please do not include these costs in the Co-funding capital spend fields

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Homes_Treated_Display
fields.fieldText:
Total Homes To Be Upgraded (from Baseline)

{!rcdParentBaseline.Total_Homes_to_be_Upgraded__c}


  • All KPIs must total no more than the displayed “Total Homes to be Upgraded (from baseline)” figure.
  • If a home meets both KPI 1 and KPI 2 within the same month, record it only under KPI 2 to reflect its current status for that month.
  • Data validation rules are in place to prevent reporting errors. If KPI entries exceed the baseline total, an error message will be displayed

fields.name: Homes_Validation_Error
fields.fieldText: ERROR: THE TOTAL NUMBER OF HOMES TO BE TREATED HAS BEEN EXCEEDED BY THE HOMES KPI VALUES - PLEASE ADJUST THE NUMBERS TO PROCEED

fields.name: ACT_Homes_Validated_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 1 - No. of Homes Validated

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: No_of_Homes_Assessed_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 2 - No. of Homes Assessed

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Homes_identified_suitable_for_retrofit
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Identified Suitable For Retrofit (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 1 - No. of Homes Identified Suitable For Retrofit

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_No_of_homes_ready_for_installs_to_start
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Ready For Installs To Start (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 2 - No. of Homes Ready For Installs To Start

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Homes_started_installations_KPI
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Started Installations (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 3 - No. of Homes Started Installations

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: No_of_Homes_Treated_With_At_Least_One_Measure_Required
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Treated With At Least One Measure (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 4 - No. of Homes Treated With At Least One Measure

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Homes_with_all_installations_completed
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes With All Installations Completed (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 4 - No. of Homes With All Installations Completed

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Home_Completed_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 5 - No. of Home Completed

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: ACT_Homes_to_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes To EPC C (* Required)
fields.helpText: Enter the number of homes to EPC C this month for this scheme

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Energy_Savings
fields.helpText: Enter the Energy Savings (kWh) this month for this scheme

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Choose_Baseline_Display
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Update: Choose Phase Baseline

{!rcdFundingAward.Name}

Monthly Update due: {!Get_correct_Deadline_date.Tenth_Working_Day__c}

fields.name: Confirmation_Display
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Update: Review

{!rcdFundingAward.Name}

{!rcdParentBaseline.Baseline_Version__c}

Update Due: {!Get_correct_Deadline_date.Tenth_Working_Day__c}



Monthly Update {!rcdUpdate.Name} has been successfully submitted.

You can edit this report up until 23:59 on {!flaFinalEditDate}

value.stringValue: Finish and Return to Update Summary Page

fields.name: Forecast_Header
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Update: Forecast for {!varNewForecastMonth}

{!rcdFundingAward.Name}

{!rcdParentBaseline.Baseline_Version__c}

Update Due: {!Get_correct_Deadline_date.Tenth_Working_Day__c}


All fields must be completed to save the form. If you have incomplete figures at the time of creating the first draft then enter 0 for that data and return to finish your update later. Updates cannot be edited after the due date


Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

fields.name: FOR_Grant_Capital_Spend_ACT
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of capital spend this month (grant only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: FOR_Grant_A_A_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Admin and Ancillary spend this month (grant only).

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: FOR_Co_funding_Capital_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of capital spend this month (co-funding only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: FOR_Co_funding_A_A_Required
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Admin and Ancillary spend this month (co-funding only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: FOR_Total_Co_funding_toward_on_gas_LCH_offer
fields.fieldText: Total Co-funding toward on-gas LCH offer

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: FOR_Homes_identified_suitable_for_retrofit
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Identified Suitable For Retrofit (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 1 - No. of Homes Identified as Suitable for Retrofit

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: FOR_No_of_homes_ready_for_installs_to_start
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Ready For Installs To Start (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 2 - No. of Homes Ready for Installs to Start

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: FOR_Homes_started_installations_KPI
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Started Installations (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 3 - No. of Homes Started Installations

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: FOR_Homes_with_all_installations_completed
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes With All Installations Completed (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 4 - No. of Homes with all Installations Completed

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: FOR_Homes_Completed_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 5 - No. of Homes Completed

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: FOR_Homes_to_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes To EPC C (* Required)
fields.helpText:
The number of homes forecast to EPC C this month for this scheme


Cumulative, derive from post-installation SAP scores

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Energy_Savings_kWh
fields.helpText: Total energy savings (SPs)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Header
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Update: Forecast {!varFinalForecastCountText}

{!rcdFundingAward.Name}

{!rcdParentBaseline.Baseline_Version__c}

Update Due: {!Get_correct_Deadline_date.Tenth_Working_Day__c}


All fields must be completed to save the form. If you have incomplete figures at the time of creating the first draft then enter 0 for that data and return to finish your update later. Updates cannot be edited after the due date.


Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Grant_Capital_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the cumulative actual/forecast Capital spend per month, from grant only

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Grant_Admin_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the cumulative actual/forecast Admin spend per month, from grant only

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Grant_A_A_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the cumulative actual/forecast Admin and Ancillary spend per month, from grant only

fields.name: Forecast_LG_of_Grant_Ancillary_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the cumulative actual/forecast Ancillary spend per month, from grant only

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Homes_Validated_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 1 - No. of Homes Validated

fields.name: Forecast_LG_No_of_Homes_Assessed_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 2 - No. of Homes Assessed

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Homes_started_installations_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 3 - No. of Homes Started Installations

fields.name: Forecast_LG_No_of_Homes_Treated_With_At_Least_One_Measure_KPI
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Treated With At Least One Measure
fields.helpText: KPI 4 - No. of Homes Treated With At Least One Measure

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Homes_Completed_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 5 - No. of Homes Completed

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Homes_to_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: No of Homes to EPC C
fields.helpText: Cumulative, derive from post-installation SAP scores

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Header
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Update: Forecast for {!Loop_Current_Forecasts.Forecast_Month__c}

{!rcdFundingAward.Name}

{!rcdParentBaseline.Baseline_Version__c}

Update Due: {!Get_correct_Deadline_date.Tenth_Working_Day__c}


All fields must be completed to save the form. If you have incomplete figures at the time of creating the first draft then enter 0 for that data and return to finish your update later. Updates cannot be edited after the due date


Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Grant_Capital_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of capital spend this month (grant only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Grant_A_A_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Admin and Ancillary spend this month (grant only).

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_funding_Capital_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of capital spend this month (co-funding only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Co_funding_A_A_Spend_Required
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Admin and Ancillary spend this month (co-funding only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Required_Total_Co_funding_toward_on_gas_LCH_offer
fields.fieldText: Total Co-funding toward on-gas LCH offer

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Homes_identified_suitable_for_retrofit
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Identified Suitable For Retrofit (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 1 - No. of Homes Identified as Suitable for Retrofit

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_No_of_homes_ready_for_installs_to_start
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Ready For Installs To Start (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 2 - No. of Homes Ready for Installs to Start

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Homes_started_installations_KPI
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Started Installations (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 3 - No. of Homes Started Installations

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Homes_with_all_installations_completed
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes With All Installations Completed (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 4 - No. of Homes with all Installations Completed

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Home_Completed_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 5 - No. of Homes Completed

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Homes_to_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes To EPC C (* Required)
fields.helpText: No. of Homes To EPC C

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Energy_Savings
fields.helpText: Total energy savings (SPs)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Read_Only_Forecast_Update_Header
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Update: Forecast for {!Loop_Current_Forecasts.Forecast_Month__c} (Read-Only)

{!rcdFundingAward.Name}

{!rcdParentBaseline.Baseline_Version__c}

Update Due: {!Get_correct_Deadline_date.Tenth_Working_Day__c}


The fields displayed are for the {!Loop_Current_Forecasts.Forecast_Month__c} Forecast record previously entered for this reporting period. This Forecast is now non-editable and will be attached to the monthly update for comparison with Actuals for the same period.

fields.name: Read_Only_Forecast_Update_Grant_Capital_Spend
fields.helpText: The amount of capital spend forecast this month (grant only)

fields.name: Read_Only_Forecast_Update_Grant_A_A_Spend
fields.helpText: The amount of Admin and Ancillary spend forecast this month (grant only).

fields.name: Read_Only_Forecast_Update_funding_Capital_Spend
fields.helpText: The amount of capital spend forecast this month (co-funding only)

fields.name: Read_Only_Co_funding_A_A_Spend_Required
fields.helpText: The amount of Admin and Ancillary spend forecast this month (co-funding only)

fields.name: Read_Only_Total_Co_funding_toward_on_gas_LCH_offer
fields.fieldText: Total Co-funding toward on-gas LCH offer (Read Only)

fields.name: Read_Only_Forecast_Update_Homes_identified_suitable_for_retrofit
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Identified Suitable For Retrofit (Read Only)
fields.helpText: KPI 1 - No. of Homes Identified as Suitable for Retrofit

fields.name: Read_Only_Forecast_Update_No_of_homes_ready_for_installs_to_start
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Ready For Installs To Start (Read Only)
fields.helpText: KPI 2 - No. of Homes Ready for Installs to Start

fields.name: Read_Only_Forecast_Update_Homes_started_installations_KPI
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Started Installations (Read Only)
fields.helpText: KPI 3 - No. of Homes Started Installations

fields.name: Read_Only_Forecast_Update_Homes_with_all_installations_completed
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes With All Installations Completed (Read Only)
fields.helpText: KPI 4 - No. of Homes with all Installations Completed

fields.name: Read_Only_Forecast_Update_Home_Completed_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 5 - No. of Homes Completed

fields.name: Read_Only_Forecast_Update_Homes_to_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes To EPC C (Read Only)
fields.helpText: No. of Homes To EPC C

fields.name: Read_Only_Forecast_Update_Energy_Savings
fields.helpText: Total energy savings (SPs)

fields.name: Summary_Header
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Update: {!flaUpdateMonthandYear}

{!rcdFundingAward.Name}

{!rcdParentBaseline.Baseline_Version__c}


All fields must be completed to save the form. If you have incomplete figures at the time of creating the first draft then enter 0 or dummy text/dates for that data and return to finish your update later. Updates cannot be edited after the due date


Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

fields.name: Homes_Approached
fields.helpText: Please enter the number of homes which have been approached but are not receiving installations

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Reasons_not_receiving_installations
fields.helpText: Please enter the number of homes which have been approached but are not continuing on the scheme, using the list below to select the reason why the homes are no longer on the scheme You can select more than one by using Ctrl and click.

fields.name: Phase_RAG_Rating
fields.helpText: Rate your delivery progress. Use Red if there are significant problems affecting your ability to deliver as expected. Use Amber for if there are problems that may affect delivery. Use Green if you're on target to deliver as expected.

fields.name: Total_No_of_Homes_Identified_As_Suitable_For_Retrofit
fields.fieldText: Total No. of Homes Identified As Suitable For Retrofit (* Required)
fields.helpText: Enter the total number of homes identified as suitable for retrofit

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Total_No_of_Homes_Ready_For_Installs_To_Start
fields.fieldText: Total No. of Homes Ready For Installs To Start (* Required)
fields.helpText: Enter the total number of homes ready for installs to start

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Total_Grant_A_A_spend_for_Project
fields.fieldText: Total Grant A&A Spend in Month (* Required)
fields.helpText: Enter the total grant A&A spend for this month (across all active phases in project this month)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Narrative_Text
fields.fieldText: You should use this area to explain any variations in your monthly report between the actuals and the forecast. For example, you should note reasons for any difference in the Key Performance Indicator figures. This will help when assessing the status of this project.

fields.name: Plan_for_Next_Month
fields.helpText: Outline what activities are planned for the next reporting period

fields.name: Progress_Update
fields.helpText: Describe the current status of the project, qualifying the RAG rating and outlining activities undergone this reporting period

fields.name: Lessons_Learned_Other_Information_optio
fields.helpText: Enter any lessons you have learned through delivery of the scheme, or any other additional information you wish to bring to our attention

fields.name: Update_Exists_Error_DisplayText
fields.fieldText:
A monthly update already exists for this reporting month

Please return to the update list and edit the existing one. If it is past the reporting deadline you must request your PSO to reopen the update for editing.

subflows.name: Fraud_and_Error_Details_Monthly_Reporting
subflows.label: Fraud and Error Details Monthly Reporting

subflows.name: GMS_Set_Funding_Award_Participant_PSO_as_Owner
subflows.label: GMS - Set Funding Award Participant PSO as Owner

textTemplates.name: txt_Date_Clarification_Message
textTemplates.text: Please enter non-cumulative data only to represent progress made in this month only

textTemplates.name: txt_Resubmission_Text
textTemplates.text:
Please adjust and resubmit your report for the following reasons:

{!rcdUpdate.Resubmission_Request_Details__c}
